es.example: Por lo visto, el tren viene atrasado.
es.exampleTranslation: Apparently the train is running late.

it.example: A quanto pare, il treno è in ritardo.

bridge.note: Both hedge with perception, on different senses: Italian leans on seeming (pare), Spanish on what has been SEEN (lo visto). Neither survives word-for-word crossing.

interference.es_to_it: Calquing gives 'por cuanto parece' — not Spanish. The idiomatic frame is por lo visto (or al parecer).
interference.it_to_es: Calquing gives 'a quanto appare/al parere' — the fixed Italian is a quanto pare.

review.notes: From Joe's Italian teacher's prepositions crash course, 2026-07-16. ES pairing chosen by Claude, unverified — reviewer to confirm.
